# Haneul Documentation for LLMs

> Comprehensive reference for Haneul blockchain development, including Move smart contract programming, Haneul framework concepts, frontend integration, and fullstack application architecture. Designed for efficient retrieval and grounding by large language models.

> For the complete, unabridged page index see [llms-full.txt](https://docs.haneul.io/llms-full.txt).

## Move

- [Move Language Reference](https://move-book.com/llms.txt)
    Complete reference for the Move programming language as used on Haneul. Covers syntax, types,
      functions, structs, abilities (copy, drop, store, key), generics, ownership and the Haneul
      object model, entry functions, public functions, module structure, error handling, events,
      and testing with the Move test framework. Includes best practices for safe and efficient
      contracts, object creation and transfer, capability patterns, witness patterns, and hot
      potato patterns. Essential reference for all Move smart contract development on Haneul.

    Read](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/consensus-object-read.md)
- [Display Registry Create
    Transaction](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/display-registry-create-transaction.md)
-
    [Display](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/display.md)
- [Dynamic Field
    Connection](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/dynamic-field-connection.md)
- [Dynamic Field
    Edge](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/dynamic-field-edge.md)
- [Dynamic
    Field](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/dynamic-field.md)
- [Ed 25519 Public
    Key](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/ed-25519-public-key.md)
- [Ed 25519
    Signature](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/ed-25519-signature.md)

    Connection](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/end-of-epoch-transaction-kind-connection.md)
- [End Of Epoch Transaction Kind
    Edge](https://docs.haneul.io/references/haneul-api/haneul-graphql/beta/reference/types/objects/end-of-epoch-transaction-kind-edge.md)
